revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data All-Palestine]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data All-Palestine]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = All-Palestine Protectorate | shortname alias = All-Palestine | flag alias = Flag of Hejaz (1917).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Egypt | related2 = Gaza | related3 = State of Palestine | related4 = Palestinian National Authority | related5 = Mandatory Palestine | cat = All-Palestine (Gaza) </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = All-Palestine Protectorate | shortname alias = All-Palestine | flag alias = Flag of Hejaz (1917).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Egypt | related2 = Gaza | related3 = State of Palestine | related4 = Palestinian National Authority | related5 = Mandatory Palestine | cat = All-Palestine (Gaza) </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_All-Palestine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
